title: Marssonia subacaulis
taxonomy: Marssonia subacaulis is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It is a type of shrub that belongs to the genus Marssonia. This plant is native to the Mediterranean region and is often found in dry, rocky areas. The classification of Marssonia subacaulis is typically as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Ericales, Family: Ericaceae, Genus: Marssonia, Species: M. subacaulis. The plant's classification is used to identify and understand its evolutionary relationships with other organisms.
